channels.label: Stable
channels.summary: tamamono 1.19.0 aligns release discipline, version contracts, coupled-readiness workflow automation, and documentation surfaces for the final pre-moxi hardening window.
notes: Primary operator-facing update track for the current pre-moxi development line.
Targets standard installs that follow the visible installation contract.

visible_rules.label: preflight integrity
visible_rules.description: Run installation integrity before switching or repairing the current release.

visible_rules.label: layout repair
visible_rules.description: Update handoff may recreate missing standard roots before applying the target release.

visible_rules.label: residue cleanup
visible_rules.description: Only residue approved by the installation integrity contract may be removed automatically.

visible_rules.label: rollback posture
visible_rules.description: Rollback stays explicit and visible by reinstalling a concrete shipped version from the same channel.

notes: Aligned Workbench-visible version strings, language-pack targets, workflow fixtures, and docs entrypoints to tamamono 1.19.0.
Keeps workflow automation surfaces aligned with the shared backend contracts instead of UI-only version state.
Aligned Hub desktop version branding, docs mirrors, update catalog visibility, and language-pack smoke expectations to tamamono 1.19.0.
Keeps update and installation contract mirrors visible from the Hub documentation surface.
Aligned Workbench desktop package, Tauri, brand, and smoke-test metadata to tamamono 1.19.0.
Keeps the desktop shell version in sync with the shared release contract.
Aligned Installer desktop version metadata, visible install integrity copy, and update-panel defaults to tamamono 1.19.0.
Keeps installation, update, cleanup, and rollback visibility tied to the current release contract.
Keeps the current release catalog and deploy/update channels aligned for operator-facing update flows.
Preserves historical 1.18.0 snapshot records while making 1.19.0 the current channel target.

versions.summary: Current-line preparation snapshot for tamamono 1.14.0, aligning product versions, release contracts, language-pack targets, installation integrity docs, and benchmark coverage for the next industrialization pass.

notes: Workbench-visible docs, app rail branding, workflow defaults, language-pack targets, and workflow package fixtures now align to 1.14.0.
Language-pack catalog IDs advance to the 1.14 line while preserving the same import/export compatibility model.
Hub package metadata, Tauri bundle version, visible brand assets, and mirrored documentation now align to 1.14.0.
Generated update-catalog and installation-integrity pages are rebuilt from the 1.14.0 release contracts.
Workbench desktop-shell package metadata, bundle version, visible brand text, and brand assets now match the 1.14.0 line.
Installer package metadata, bundle version, update UI defaults, integrity UI defaults, and visible shell branding now align to 1.14.0.
Installation integrity component versions now match the active 1.14.0 shipping contract.
Release-facing docs and catalog metadata now publish 1.14.0 as the current update target.
Benchmark coverage now includes the thermal-structural matrix and shape guards for remote-scale profile preparation.

versions.summary: Current-line functional snapshot for tamamono 1.13.0, aligning desktop shells, release contracts, generated docs, language-pack targets, workflow defaults, and the Rust workspace while continuing operator capability work for material screening and headless execution.

notes: Workbench-visible docs, app rail branding, workflow defaults, language-pack targets, and workflow package fixtures now align to 1.13.0.
Workflow local graph defaults remain explicit so imported and duplicated graphs carry the current line clearly.
Hub package metadata, Tauri bundle version, visible brand assets, and mirrored documentation now align to 1.13.0.
Generated update-catalog and installation-integrity pages are rebuilt from the 1.13.0 release contracts.
Workbench desktop-shell package metadata, bundle version, visible brand text, and package locks now match the 1.13.0 line.
Installer package metadata, bundle version, update UI defaults, integrity UI defaults, and visible shell branding now align to 1.13.0.
Installation integrity component versions now match the active shipping contract.
Release-facing docs and catalog metadata now publish 1.13.0 as the current update target.
Operator catalog mirrors include the current material margin and candidate-ranking transform surfaces.

versions.summary: Current-line baseline snapshot for tamamono 1.12.0, aligning desktop shells, release contracts, language-pack targets, workflow graph defaults, documentation mirrors, and the Rust workspace version for the next 1.12.x functional line.

notes: Workbench-visible docs, app rail branding, workflow graph defaults, language-pack targets, and test fixtures now align to the 1.12.0 shipping baseline.
The 1.12.x line keeps workflow串联、算子能力、无头 SDK and localization surfaces tied to one visible version contract.
Hub package metadata, Tauri bundle version, shell branding, and mirrored documentation now align to 1.12.0.
Generated update-catalog and installation-integrity pages are rebuilt from the 1.12.0 release contracts.
Workbench desktop-shell package metadata, bundle version, visible brand text, and package locks now match the 1.12.0 baseline.
Installer package metadata, bundle version, update UI defaults, integrity UI defaults, and visible shell branding now align to 1.12.0.
Release metadata, update channels, installation contracts, and generated catalog surfaces now track 1.12.0 as the current public shipping version.

versions.summary: Current-line reinstall snapshot for tamamono 1.11.5, aligning desktop packages, installer contracts, update channels, language-pack driven localization, and generated documentation before the 1.12.0 shell refresh.

notes: Workbench language selection now accepts language-pack-only locale codes and falls back to the stable English copy shape before applying pack overrides.
Workbench package metadata, docs pages, app rail branding, workflow local metadata, and language-pack targets now align to 1.11.5.
Hub package metadata, Tauri bundle version, visible brand assets, and mirrored docs now align to 1.11.5.
Hub language packs can expose non-built-in locale choices in the shell language selector and resolve them through the requested-language override path.
Workbench desktop shell package metadata, bundle version, visible brand assets, and package locks now match the 1.11.5 shipping version.
Installer package metadata, bundle version, visible shell branding, and integrity surfaces now align to 1.11.5.
Release metadata, update channels, installation contracts, and generated catalog surfaces now track 1.11.5 as the current public shipping version.
